en_title: Call of Duty: Warzone to Shut Down on PS4 and Xbox One as Modern Warfare 4 Leaves Last-Gen Consoles Behind
cn_title: 《使命召唤:战区》将关停PS4和Xbox One版本

paragraphs.en: Activision has confirmed that Call of Duty: Warzone will soon shut down on PlayStation 4 and Xbox One, as part of the upcoming Modern Warfare 4 leaving last-gen consoles behind.
paragraphs.cn: 动视确认《使命召唤:战区》(Call of Duty: Warzone)即将在PlayStation 4和Xbox One平台关停,这是即将发售的《现代战争4》全面放弃上世代主机的连锁举措之一。

paragraphs.en: Modern Warfare 4, due out in October, is set for release on PC, Xbox Series X and S, PlayStation 5, and Nintendo Switch 2 only. There is no version for PS4 or Xbox One.
paragraphs.cn: 《现代战争4》将于10月发售,登陆PC、Xbox Series X/S、PlayStation 5和Nintendo Switch 2四个平台,不再推出PS4和Xbox One版本。

paragraphs.en: Season 1 of Modern Warfare 4 kicks off shortly after the game itself launches on October 23. And with that, Warzone will integrate with Modern Warfare 4 content and seasonal progression.
paragraphs.cn: 《现代战争4》将于10月23日发售,首个赛季紧随其后启动,届时《战区》将与《现代战争4》的内容和赛季进度全面打通。

paragraphs.en: The Best Call of Duty Campaigns
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤》系列最佳战役模式

paragraphs.en: But the big news here is that Warzone on PS4 and Xbox One will no longer be playable starting with Season 1. Even before then, from June 4, the battle royale will no longer be available for new downloads on those consoles, though existing players can continue to play until Season 1 launches. Some Call of Duty microtransactions won't be available on those platforms either.
paragraphs.cn: 但真正重磅的消息是:首个赛季开启的同时,《战区》PS4/Xbox One版本将彻底无法再玩。在那之前,从6月4日起,这款大逃杀游戏就将停止对上述平台的新下载——已下载的玩家可以继续玩到第一赛季开启。部分《使命召唤》系列内购也将在这些平台上下架。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, on June 25, the in-game store for Call of Duty: Warzone on PS4 and Xbox One will be removed. Players can still progress through free Battle Pass tiers, including unlocking new weapons in remaining Black Ops 7 seasons, Activision said.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时,6月25日《战区》PS4/Xbox One版的游戏内商店将被关闭。动视表示,玩家依然可以解锁免费战令(Battle Pass)等级,包括《黑色行动7》剩余赛季的新武器奖励。

paragraphs.en: The PS4 and Xbox One are nearly 13 years old now, and with Call of Duty moving onto current-gen only with Modern Warfare 4, Warzone following suit was probably inevitable for Activision, given it's sharing content across both games. But it does feel like something of an end of an era, given Warzone's huge launch in early 2020, before the PS5 and Xbox Series X and S came out.
paragraphs.cn: PS4和Xbox One已经接近13岁,《使命召唤》系列从《现代战争4》开始全面拥抱次世代,《战区》随之跟进对动视来说几乎是必然——毕竟两款游戏共享内容生态。但这依然带着一丝时代终结的味道——《战区》是2020年初横空出世的现象级作品,那时PS5和Xbox Series X/S甚至还没发售。

opus_summary: 动视确认《使命召唤:战区》将于10月底《现代战争4》首赛季开启时,在PS4/Xbox One平台关停。6月4日起停止新下载,6月25日商店下架,首赛季开启后彻底无法游玩,标志着该系列正式告别上世代主机。
